purpose: Per-parser-family AST-shape contract for the SystemVerilog grammar. The generated SV parser is NOT in the default `cargo test --features generated_parsers` build; it is produced on-demand by `sv_stimuli_quality_gate` (and similar) into `rust/target/<gate>/work/systemverilog_parser.rs` and discarded. The cfg `has_generated_systemverilog_parser` therefore stays off in default builds and the matching unit test compiles out. When the parser is present (gate run or `PGEN_SYSTEMVERILOG_PARSER_PATH` override), the test activates and the contract is enforced.
doctrine: Calibrated 2026-05-04 against a freshly-generated parser (parser release 1.0.1, contract 1.0.1). On first run with the parser available, this manifest is expected to match тАФ `current_content_kind: "json_object"` was confirmed by running `parseability_probe --parse-dump-ast-pretty systemverilog /tmp/sv_calibration/minimal_module.sv` after the SV-Slice-1 grammar fix that moved the dangling `systemverilog_file` annotation onto the rule it was supposed to attach to. Future drift fails the regression-lock and surfaces the change to the slice that introduced it.
calibration_history: 2026-05-06 SV-Slice-46 (batch): expression family typed (14 rules / 62 annotations тАФ crosses 700-annotation milestone). Single largest impact slice тАФ `expression`, `constant_expression`, and their operand/operator/literal sub-rules underlie EVERY expression-typed field across the grammar (every parameter value, port connection, variable initializer, function/task argument, condition, ranges, etc.). (a) `expression` 3 kinds (base / inside / conditional). (b) `expression_base` 3 kinds (tagged_union / operand_chain `{first, rest}` / paren_op_assign). (c) `expression_operand` 3 kinds (unary `{op, attributes, primary}` / inc_or_dec / primary). (d) `expression_or_dist` typed `{expr, dist}`. (e) `constant_expression` typed `{first, rest, ternary}` (binary-op chain + optional `?:` ternary tail). (f) `constant_expression_operand` 2 kinds (unary / primary). (g) `inside_expression_sv_2017/2023` typed `{expr, ranges}` (drops kw_inside). (h) `conditional_expression` typed `{predicate, attributes, then_expr, else_expr}` (drops question / colon; preserves `&question` lookahead from source grammar). (i) `tagged_union_expression_sv_2017/2023` typed `{name, value}`. (j) `primary_literal` 4 kinds (number / time_literal / unbased_unsized_literal / string_literal). (k) `binary_operator` 29 kinds bare {kind} (plus / minus / star / slash / percent / equal / not_equal / case_equal / case_not_equal / wildcard_equal / wildcard_not_equal / logical_and / logical_or / power / less_than / less_equal / greater_than / greater_equal / bitwise_and / bitwise_or / bitwise_xor / reduction_xnor_alt / reduction_xnor / shift_right / shift_left / arithmetic_shift_right / arithmetic_shift_left / implies / iff_arrow). (l) `unary_operator` 11 kinds bare {kind} (plus / minus / bang / tilde / bitwise_and / reduction_nand / bitwise_or / reduction_nor / bitwise_xor / reduction_xnor / reduction_xnor_alt). After this slice every reachable expression / constant_expression / primary_literal / operator dispatch resolves through typed shapes. Crosses the 700-annotation milestone. Annotation count: 706 (was 644, +62). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-45 (batch): pattern + cond_predicate family typed (6 rules / 18 annotations) тАФ closes the LRM A.6.7.1 pattern-matching walk path used by case_pattern_item, conditional_statement.condition (via cond_predicate), constraint_expression's various forms, etc. (a) `cond_predicate` typed `{first, rest}` (mini-mixed-array of `&&&`-separated expression_or_cond_pattern values per LRM A.6.7.1). (b) `cond_pattern` typed `{expression, pattern}` (drops kw_matches). (c) `expression_or_cond_pattern` 2 kinds (expression / cond_pattern). (d) `pattern_sv_2017` 6 kinds: variable_capture (.name) / wildcard (.*) / expression / tagged ({name, sub_pattern}) / ordered ({patterns: {first, rest}}) / named ({entries: {first: {name, pattern}, rest}}). (e) `pattern_sv_2023` 7 kinds тАФ adds `parenthesized` ({body}) prefix per LRM 2023 (A.6.7.1 expanded pattern grammar). (f) `assignment_pattern` typed `{exprs: {first, rest}}` (drops `'{` / `}`; mini-mixed-array). After this slice every reachable pattern-matching context (case patterns, conditional predicates, constraint expressions, randcase items via cond_predicate descent, etc.) exposes typed pattern-form discrimination. Annotation count: 644 (was 626, +18). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-44 (batch): list_of_* family typed (20 rules / 22 annotations) тАФ uniform mini-mixed-array pattern across the small declaration-list rules. (a) Simple `{first, rest}` (12 rules): list_of_clocking_decl_assign / list_of_defparam_assignments / list_of_genvar_identifiers / list_of_net_assignments / list_of_net_decl_assignments / list_of_param_assignments / list_of_path_inputs / list_of_path_outputs / list_of_specparam_assignments / list_of_type_assignments / list_of_variable_assignments / list_of_variable_decl_assignments. (b) `{first: {name, dims}, rest}` (3 rules with trailing `unpacked_dimension*`): list_of_interface_identifiers / list_of_port_identifiers / list_of_variable_identifiers. (c) `{first: {name, dims, init}, rest}` (2 rules with optional initializer): list_of_tf_variable_identifiers / list_of_variable_port_identifiers. (d) `{first, second, rest}` (1 rule with 2 required items): list_of_cross_items (cross requires `cross_item, cross_item, cross_item, ...`). (e) 2-kind dispatch (2 rules): list_of_checker_port_connections (ordered/named) / list_of_port_connections (named/ordered). After this slice, every list_of_* rule referenced from typed parents (variable declarations, port declarations, parameter declarations, net declarations, function/task body items, etc.) exposes a typed `{first, rest}` mini-mixed-array shape тАФ no more raw envelopes for declaration-list iterations. Annotation count: 626 (was 604, +22). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-43 (batch): parameter_value_assignment + arguments family typed (10 rules / 16 annotations тАФ crosses 600-annotation milestone). Closes the function/task/method-call argument and parameter-instance walks. Every typed parent that exposes `params:` (e.g., class_type, virtual_interface, instantiations) or `args:` (e.g., production_item, rs_production_item, named_argument calls, subroutine_call) field now resolves to typed dispatch. (a) `parameter_value_assignment_sv_2017/2023` typed `{params}`. (b) `list_of_parameter_assignments_sv_2017` 2 kinds (ordered / named тАФ both with mini-mixed-array). (c) `list_of_parameter_value_assignments_sv_2023` 2 kinds (parallel). (d) `named_parameter_assignment` typed `{name, value}`. (e) `named_argument` typed `{name, value}` тАФ parallel shape used in argument lists. (f) `list_of_arguments` 3 kinds (ordered / named / mixed). (g) `list_of_arguments_ordered` typed `{first, rest}` (positional argument iteration). (h) `list_of_arguments_named` typed `{first, rest}`. (i) `list_of_arguments_mixed` typed `{head, named: {first, rest}}` (positional arguments followed by named arguments). (j) `list_of_arguments_mixed_head` 2 kinds (single / chain тАФ recursive). Crosses the 600-annotation milestone. Annotation count: 604 (was 588, +16). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-42 (batch): signing + struct_union + enum + type_reference + class_type internals typed (9 rules / 21 annotations + 2 new helper rules with 5 annotations) тАФ closes data_type field structural-content walks. (a) `signing` 2 kinds bare (signed / unsigned). (b) `struct_union_sv_2017` 2 kinds (struct / union with optional tagged). (c) `struct_union_sv_2023` 2 kinds (struct / union with `union_modifier` helper rule capturing the optional soft-or-tagged keyword). (d) `union_modifier` (NEW helper rule) 2 kinds bare (soft / tagged) тАФ extracted from inline `( kw_soft | kw_tagged )?` parens-Or to dodge task #38. (e) `struct_union_member` typed `{attributes, random_qualifier, data_type, decls}`. (f) `enum_base_type` 3 kinds (atom / vector / type_alias). (g) `enum_name_declaration` typed `{name, range, value}`. (h) `type_reference_sv_2017/2023` 2 kinds each (expression / data_type[_or_incomplete_class_scoped]). (i) `class_type` typed `{head, params, suffix}` using `class_type_head` helper. (j) `class_type_head` (NEW helper rule) 3 kinds (scoped / class / interface_class) тАФ extracted from leading 3-way parens-Or (5th use of helper-rule extraction pattern). After this slice all data_type sub-trees referenced from data_type's 15-kind dispatch (typed in SV-Slice-41) resolve through typed shapes. Annotation count: 588 (was 567, +21). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-41 (batch): data_type family typed (8 rules / 36 annotations) тАФ pervasive impact across the entire grammar; data_type fields appear in module/interface/program port declarations, function/task return types, variable declarations, parameter declarations, struct/union members, etc. (a) `data_type` 15 kinds: integer_vector / integer_atom / non_integer / struct_union (with members mini-mixed-array) / enum (with names mini-mixed-array) / string / chandle / virtual_interface / scoped_data_type / known_unscoped_data_type / class_type / provisional_class_type / event / covergroup / type_reference. (b) `data_type_or_implicit` 2 kinds (data_type / implicit). (c) `data_type_or_void` 2 kinds (data_type / void). (d) `data_type_or_incomplete_class_scoped_type_sv_2023` 2 kinds. (e) `implicit_data_type` typed `{signing, dims}`. (f) `integer_atom_type` 6 kinds bare (byte / shortint / int / longint / integer / time). (g) `integer_vector_type` 3 kinds bare (bit / logic / reg). (h) `non_integer_type` 3 kinds bare (shortreal / real / realtime). (i) `integer_type` 2 kinds (vector / atom). After this slice every typed `data_type` field across the grammar (function_body_declaration.return_type / task return / variable_decl.data_type / port_decl / etc.) discriminates which underlying SV type is in use without requiring envelope walks. Annotation count: 567 (was 531, +36). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-40 (batch): simple immediate assertions + inc_or_dec + weight_specification typed (6 rules / 11 annotations) тАФ closes immediate_assertion_statement.kind=='simple' walk path and weight_specification used by rs_rule_sv_2017. (a) `simple_immediate_assertion_statement` 3 kinds (assert / assume / cover) тАФ bridges to the 3 specific simple_immediate_*_statement rules. (b) `simple_immediate_assert_statement` typed `{condition, action}` (drops kw_assert / parens). (c) `simple_immediate_assume_statement` parallel `{condition, action}`. (d) `simple_immediate_cover_statement` typed `{condition, statement}` (uses statement_or_null instead of action_block тАФ cover has no pass/fail branching). (e) `inc_or_dec_expression` 2 kinds: `"prefix"` (`{op, attributes, lvalue}` тАФ `++a` / `--a`) / `"postfix"` (`{lvalue, attributes, op}` тАФ `a++` / `a--`). The `attributes` slot carries inline attribute_instance* (LRM allows `a (* attr *) ++` form). (f) `weight_specification_sv_2017` 3 kinds (number / identifier / expression) тАФ sv_2017 counterpart of rs_weight_specification_sv_2023 typed in SV-Slice-39. After this slice, immediate_assertion_statement walk is fully closed and inc_or_dec_expression (referenced from blocking_assignment_sv_2023.kind=='inc_or_dec' and statement_item_sv_2017.kind=='inc_or_dec_expression') is typed. Annotation count: 531 (was 520, +11). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-39 (batch): rs_* family typed (17 rules / 31 annotations тАФ crosses 500-annotation milestone). Closes the random-sequence walk path end-to-end. After this slice, every reachable randsequence_statement тЖТ production тЖТ rules.{first,rest} тЖТ rs_rule тЖТ rs_production_list тЖТ rs_prod тЖТ ... resolves through typed shapes with no raw-envelope intermediate. (a) `rs_case` typed `{expr, items: {first, rest}}` (mini-mixed-array). (b) `rs_case_item_sv_2017/2023` 2 kinds each (expr_list `{exprs: {first, rest}, body}` / default `{body}`). (c) `rs_code_block` typed `{body}` (exposes the Quantified-of-parens-grouped-sequence iteration as-is). (d) `rs_if_else_sv_2017/2023` typed `{condition, then_body, else_body}`. (e) `rs_prod_sv_2017/2023` 5 kinds each (production_item / rs_code_block / rs_if_else / rs_repeat / rs_case). (f) `rs_production_sv_2023` typed `{return_type, name, ports, rules: {first, rest}}` (parallel to production_sv_2017 from SV-Slice-38). (g) `rs_production_item_sv_2023` typed `{name, args}` (parallel). (h) `rs_production_list_sv_2017/2023` 2 kinds each (productions `{items: {first, rest}}` / rand_join `{join_count, items: {first, second, rest}}` тАФ at least 2 production_items required for rand-join per LRM). (i) `rs_repeat_sv_2017/2023` typed `{count, body}`. (j) `rs_rule_sv_2017/2023` typed `{productions, weight}` тАФ `weight` carries the optional `( colon assign weight_specification ( rs_code_block )? )?` slot. (k) `rs_weight_specification_sv_2023` 3 kinds (number / identifier / expression). The randsequence sub-tree is now FULLY typed end-to-end. Crosses the 500-annotation milestone. Annotation count: 520 (was 489, +31). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-38 (batch): randsequence top-level + production typed (4 rules / 4 annotations) тАФ closes the last raw-envelope statement_item kind. After this slice, every framed procedural statement in module/program/function/task bodies type-discriminates into a structured shape AND every typed body content (productions / rules) is reachable. (a) `randsequence_statement_sv_2017` typed `{start, productions: {first, rest}}` (drops kw_randsequence / parens / kw_endsequence; mini-mixed-array). (b) `randsequence_statement_sv_2023` parallel `{start, productions: {first, rest}}` (uses rs_production instead of production per LRM 2023 namespacing). (c) `production_sv_2017` typed `{return_type, name, ports, rules: {first, rest}}` (drops colon, semi; mini-mixed-array on rules separated by `|`). (d) `production_item_sv_2017` typed `{name, args}` (args is the optional `( lparen list_of_arguments rparen )?` slot). DEFERRED: rs_* internals (rs_rule, rs_prod, rs_case, rs_if_else, rs_repeat, rs_code_block, rs_production_list тАФ all referenced from the now-typed top-level forms) тАФ large rs_* sub-tree to be typed in a follow-up slice. Annotation count: 489 (was 485, +4). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-37 (batch): blocking_assignment typed via helper-rule extraction (3 rules / 12 annotations + 1 new helper rule with 3 annotations) тАФ closes the last DEFERRED statement_item kind. After this slice, ALL 20/19 statement_item kinds (sv_2017/sv_2023) expose typed dispatch end-to-end. (a) `blocking_assignment_sv_2017` 4 kinds: `"delay_assign"` (`{lvalue, delay, value}` тАФ variable_lvalue = #N expression), `"dynamic_array_new"` (`{lvalue, value}` тАФ nonrange_lvalue = new[size]), `"class_new"` (`{scope, name, select, value}` тАФ uses NEW helper rule for the class/package scope prefix), `"operator"` (`{body}` тАФ wraps operator_assignment). (b) `blocking_assignment_sv_2023` 5 kinds (same 4 plus `"inc_or_dec"` `{body}` тАФ LRM 2023 allows ++/-- as a blocking_assignment form, subsuming sv_2017's separate inc_or_dec_expression statement). (c) `class_or_package_scope` (NEW helper rule) 3 kinds: `"instance"` (`{handle}` тАФ implicit_class_handle dot prefix), `"class_scope"` (`{body}`), `"package_scope"` (`{body}`). Helper rule extracted from inline `( implicit_class_handle dot | class_scope | package_scope )?` parens-Or to dodge task #38 (4th use of the helper-rule extraction pattern after if_generate_else_clause from SV-Slice-23, net_strength + net_vector_scalar from SV-Slice-26, conditional_else_branch from SV-Slice-35). After this slice, statement_item walk is FULLY typed end-to-end across all kinds. Annotation count: 485 (was 473, +12). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-36 (batch): assignments + procedural assertions + randcase typed (8 rules / 16 annotations) тАФ closes 4 more statement_item kinds (nonblocking_assignment / procedural_continuous_assignment / clocking_drive / randcase / procedural_assertion). (a) `nonblocking_assignment` typed `{lvalue, control, value}` (drops less_equal). (b) `procedural_continuous_assignment` 6 kinds: `"assign"` `{body}` (kw_assign + variable_assignment) / `"deassign"` `{target}` / `"force_variable"` `{body}` / `"force_net"` `{body}` / `"release_variable"` `{target}` / `"release_net"` `{target}`. (c) `clocking_drive` typed `{lvalue, cycle_delay, value}` (drops less_equal). (d) `randcase_statement` typed `{items: {first, rest}}` (drops kw_randcase / kw_endcase; mini-mixed-array). (e) `randcase_item` typed `{weight, body}` (drops colon). (f) `procedural_assertion_statement` 3 kinds (concurrent / immediate / checker_instantiation). (g) `immediate_assertion_statement` 2 kinds (simple / deferred тАФ bridges to deferred_immediate_assertion_statement typed in SV-Slice-30). (h) `variable_assignment` typed `{lvalue, value}` (drops assign). DEFERRED: `blocking_assignment_sv_2017/2023` typing тАФ branch 2 has parens-Or `( implicit_class_handle dot | class_scope | package_scope )?` (3-way Or with mixed sequence/atom bodies); needs helper-rule extraction. Annotation count: 473 (was 457, +16). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-35 (batch): conditional_statement typed via helper-rule extraction (1 rule / 1 annotation + 1 new helper rule with 2 annotations) тАФ closes the if-else dispatch path. Unblocks the SV-Slice-34 DEFERRED `conditional_statement` typing using the established helper-rule pattern (third use after if_generate_else_clause from SV-Slice-23 and net_strength/net_vector_scalar from SV-Slice-26). (a) `conditional_statement` typed `{unique_priority, condition, then_body, else_body}` (drops kw_if / lparen / rparen / kw_else; the original parens-Or `( conditional_statement | statement_or_null )` extracted to helper rule). (b) `conditional_else_branch` (NEW helper rule) 2 kinds: `"elseif"` (body is recursive conditional_statement; supports `else if (...)` chains) / `"else"` (body is statement_or_null; terminal else). Cascading walk impact: every reachable `statement_item.kind=='conditional'` (typed in SV-Slice-32) now exposes typed dispatch into condition / then-body / else-body. NOTE: the rule preserves a `&kw_else` positive lookahead before the consumed `kw_else` тАФ this is a PEG idiom from the source grammar that asserts the else-branch is required; it appears unchanged in the helper-rule refactor. Annotation count: 457 (was 454, +3). Same accept set.

2026-05-06 SV-Slice-34 (batch): case + loop families typed (7 rules / 18 annotations) тАФ closes case-statement and loop-statement walks (statement_item kinds 'case' and 'loop'). (a) `case_statement` typed `{unique_priority, keyword, expr, items: {first, rest}}` (drops kw_endcase, parens; mini-mixed-array on items). (b) `case_keyword` 3 kinds bare (case / casez / casex). (c) `case_item` 2 kinds (expr_list `{exprs: {first, rest}, body}` / default `{body}`). (d) `case_pattern_item` 2 kinds (pattern `{pattern, condition, body}` / default `{body}` тАФ condition is the optional `&&& expression` guard). (e) `case_inside_item_sv_2017` 2 kinds (range_list `{ranges, body}` using open_range_list / default `{body}`). (f) `case_inside_item_sv_2023` 2 kinds (range_list using LRM 2023 `range_list` instead of `open_range_list` / default). (g) `loop_statement` 6 kinds: `"forever"` `{body}` / `"repeat"` `{count, body}` / `"while"` `{condition, body}` / `"for"` `{init, condition, step, body}` / `"do_while"` `{body, condition}` / `"foreach"` `{array, loop_vars, body}`. DEFERRED: `unique_priority` typing тАФ has duplicate `kw_unique` branches (probable grammar bug, branches 0 and 1 identical), needs grammar fix before clean annotation. DEFERRED: `conditional_statement` typing тАФ has parens-Or `( conditional_statement | statement_or_null )` and `&kw_else` lookahead pattern requiring careful helper-rule extraction; tracked for future slice. Annotation count: 454 (was 436, +18). Same accept set.

2026-05-05 SV-Slice-33 (batch): procedural-statement forms typed (11 rules / 26 annotations) тАФ closes 7 statement_item kinds. (a) `disable_statement` 3 kinds (task / block / fork). (b) `jump_statement` 3 kinds (return `{value}` / break / continue). (c) `wait_statement` 3 kinds (wait `{condition, body}` / wait_fork / wait_order `{events: {first, rest}, action}`). (d) `event_trigger_sv_2017` 2 kinds (non_blocking `{name}` / blocking `{control, name}`). (e) `event_trigger_sv_2023` 2 kinds (parallel; both add `select` field per LRM 2023 nonrange_select). (f) `procedural_timing_control_statement` typed `{control, body}`. (g) `procedural_timing_control` 3 kinds (delay / event / cycle). (h) `subroutine_call` 5 kinds (class_scoped_tf / tf / system_tf / method / randomize with optional std-scope prefix). (i) `subroutine_call_statement` 2 kinds (call / void_cast for void function calls). (j) `seq_block` typed `{label, declarations, statements, end_label}`. (k) `par_block` typed `{label, declarations, statements, join, end_label}` тАФ `join` carries the typed `join_keyword`. Cascading walk impact: 7 of statement_item's 19/20 kinds (disable/jump/wait/event_trigger/procedural_timing_control/subroutine_call/par_block/seq_block) now expose typed dispatch into actual content. Annotation count: 436 (was 410, +26). Same accept set.

2026-05-05 SV-Slice-32 (batch): statement_item dispatch typed (3 rules / 43 annotations тАФ crosses 400-annotation milestone). Closes the statement.body field, exposing typed dispatch into all 20 procedural-statement forms (or 19 in sv_2023). (a) `statement_item_sv_2017` 20 kinds: blocking_assignment / nonblocking_assignment / procedural_continuous_assignment (each drops trailing semi) / case / conditional / inc_or_dec_expression (drops semi) / subroutine_call / disable / event_trigger / loop / jump / par_block / procedural_timing_control / seq_block / wait / procedural_assertion / clocking_drive (drops semi) / randsequence / randcase / expect_property. (b) `statement_item_sv_2023` 19 kinds (same as sv_2017 except `inc_or_dec_expression semi` is removed тАФ LRM 2023 disallows bare-statement increment/decrement at procedural level since the same semantics are subsumed by blocking_assignment with `++`/`--`). (c) `block_item_declaration` 4 kinds (block_data / local_parameter / parameter / let) тАФ each preserves attribute_instance* prefix; reached from tf_item_declaration.kind=='block_item' (typed in SV-Slice-31). After this slice, every framed statement in module/program/function/task bodies exposes typed dispatch into actual procedural-statement form. Crosses 400-annotation threshold. Annotation count: 410 (was 367, +43). Same accept set.

2026-05-05 SV-Slice-31 (batch): action_block + statement framing typed (5 rules / 9 annotations) тАФ closes the action_block walk path used pervasively by assertions and conditional statements. (a) `action_block` 2 kinds: `"always"` (`{body}` тАФ single statement_or_null, runs unconditionally) / `"with_else"` (`{pass, fail}` тАФ pass is optional pre-else statement, fail is the else statement_or_null; LRM A.6.3 form `[statement] else statement_or_null`). (b) `statement` typed `{label, attributes, body}` (label is optional `( block_identifier colon !colon )?` тАФ the `!colon` is a negative lookahead distinguishing block-label from `::` scope-resolution; attributes is the standard attribute_instance* prefix). (c) `statement_or_null` 2 kinds: `"statement"` (`{body}` тАФ wraps a non-null statement) / `"null"` (`{attributes}` тАФ bare `;` with optional preceding attribute_instance*). (d) `function_statement_or_null` parallel 2 kinds тАФ same shape as statement_or_null but for function bodies. (e) `tf_item_declaration` 2 kinds (block_item / tf_port) тАФ referenced from function_body_declaration.items / task_body_declaration.items. After this slice, every assertion's `action`/`statement` field, every function/task body item, and every framed statement now exposes typed dispatch into actual content. Annotation count: 367 (was 358, +9). Same accept set.

2026-05-05 SV-Slice-30 (batch): deferred immediate assertions typed (5 rules / 10 annotations) тАФ closes assertion_item.kind=='deferred_immediate' walk path. (a) `deferred_immediate_assertion_item` typed `{label, body}` тАФ label is the optional `( block_identifier colon )?` per LRM A.6.10 (parallel to concurrent_assertion_item.kind='statement' label slot). (b) `deferred_immediate_assertion_statement` 3 kinds (assert / assume / cover) тАФ uniform `{kind, body}` dispatch. (c) `deferred_immediate_assert_statement` 2 kinds: `"zero_delay"` (`{expression, action}` тАФ `assert #0 (expr) action_block`) / `"final"` (`{expression, action}` тАФ `assert final (expr) action_block`). (d) `deferred_immediate_assume_statement` parallel 2 kinds (zero_delay / final) тАФ same shape as assert. (e) `deferred_immediate_cover_statement` parallel 2 kinds (zero_delay / final) тАФ uses `statement` field (statement_or_null) instead of `action` since cover has no pass/fail branching. After this slice, both `assertion_item.kind=='concurrent'` (typed in SV-Slice-29) and `assertion_item.kind=='deferred_immediate'` (typed THIS slice) walk paths are fully closed. Annotation count: 358 (was 348, +10). Same accept set.

2026-05-05 SV-Slice-29 (batch): concurrent assertion + constraint family typed (16 rules / 28 annotations). Closes assertion_item.kind=='concurrent' and class_constraint walk paths. Concurrent assertions: (a) `concurrent_assertion_statement` 5 kinds (assert_property / assume_property / cover_property / cover_sequence / restrict_property). (b) `assert_property_statement` typed `{spec, action}` (drops kw_assert / kw_property / parens). (c) `assume_property_statement` parallel `{spec, action}`. (d) `cover_property_statement` `{spec, statement}` (cover uses statement_or_null instead of action_block). For an input with `` `define FOO bar `` followed by `module m; endmodule\n`, source_text now has 2 items: item[0] is `{kind: "compiler_directive", body: "`define FOO bar"}` (body is now a clean string instead of nested envelope), item[1] is the typed module description. Drops the `trivia` prefix slot from the matched sequence; emits just the captured directive text. Annotation count: 20 (was 19). Same accept set; only the compiler_directive shape changed.

2026-05-04 SV-Slice-4: `description` per-branch typed (8 branches). Each Or branch annotated. Branches 1-5 + 8 (single-element): `{kind: "<branch_name>", body: $1}`. Branches 6-7 (multi-element `attribute_instance* X`): `{kind: "<branch_name>", attributes: $1, body: $2}` тАФ preserves attribute_instance* prefix as a separate `attributes` field. For the `module m; endmodule\n` sample, source_text[0].body is now `{"kind": "module_declaration", "body": <envelope>}` (was raw envelope). Two layers of typed dispatch now end-to-end (source_text_item.kind тЖТ description.kind). Annotation count: 19 (was 11). Same accept set.

2026-05-04 SV-Slice-3: `source_text_item` per-branch typed (8 branches). Each Or branch annotated with `{kind: "<branch_name>", body: $1}` тАФ kinds: description, local_parameter_declaration, parameter_declaration, package_import_declaration, timeunits_declaration, compiler_directive, comment_only_source_region, semi (the last carries no body since it's just `;`). Pre-fix each source_text_item carried the matched-branch shape directly without a discriminator; post-fix consumers can dispatch on `item["kind"]`. For the `module m; endmodule\n` sample, source_text[0] is now `{"kind": "description", "body": <description envelope>}`. Annotation count: 11 (was 3). Same accept set.

2026-05-04 SV-Slice-2: `source_text := source_text_item*` annotated `-> [$1**]`. Pre-fix `source_text` field of `systemverilog_file` was a nested Quantified envelope; post-fix it's a flat array of `source_text_item` shapes. For the `module m; endmodule\n` sample, source_text now has length 1 (the single module_declaration's source_text_item envelope) instead of the Quantified wrapper. Annotation count: 3 (was 2). Same accept set; only the source_text array shape changed.

2026-05-04 SV-Slice-1: dangling annotation `-> {type: "systemverilog_file", source_text: $2}` at grammars/systemverilog.ebnf line 195 was moved onto its target rule `systemverilog_file` (line 184). Pre-fix the annotation was lost (separated from its rule by a blank line + the `sv_multi_entry_root` helper definition + another blank line) and the parser registered 0 annotations effective on systemverilog_file. Post-fix the parser registers 2 annotations (systemverilog_file + systemverilog_parseable_file) and the AST root for `module m; endmodule\n` is the typed `{type: "systemverilog_file", source_text: ...}` JSON object documented below.
